_comment: Cross-language contract for the recipe_id slug (ADR-024 #741). Both the Python compiler (scripts/tools/dx/custom_alerts/shape.py) and the Go exporter (components/threshold-exporter/app/pkg/config/custom_alert.go) MUST compute these exact slugs from these inputs — a drift silently breaks every on(tenant) group_left join. Pure string assembly: no hash, no locale, no map-order dependence. NOTE (TRK-326): `for` is part of the slug (control-plane static rule attribute) and is ALWAYS emitted as the trailing `__for{for}` part (default 1m). Add a case when adding a recipe/param.

vectors._note: selector ordering must be deterministic: sorted by (key, op), regardless of YAML/map iteration order
grammar coverage: op omitted → default ">" → gt (must be identical Go/Python)
TRK-326: explicit for=5m enters the slug → distinct shape from the default-for (1m) twin above, so two tenants with different `for` compile to two distinct rules (no silent overwrite)
TRK-326: for=0s (fire-immediately) is a valid enum value and yields its own slug
forecast ratio mode (#741): capacity_metric set → headroom ratio; `h{horizon}` takes the window slot, capacity reuses the den_ slot; no window
forecast raw mode (#741): no capacity_metric → predict the gauge crossing an absolute threshold; no den_ part, no window
